title: pulicaria scabra
intro: Pulicaria scabra is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the rough fleabane or hairy pulicaria. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pulicaria scabra include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a remedy for skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Pulicaria scabra include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using the plant's extracts in ointments and creams.
